expectations.evidence: Uses advisor__get_recommendations_stats (Step 1) and advisor__get_active_rules (Step 2). No vulnerability tools invoked.
Treats advisor as its own domain. User-facing response discusses 'Advisor recommendations' without conflating with CVEs or vulnerability data.
advisor__get_recommendations_stats called with no args. advisor__get_active_rules called with limit=20 (number) and sort="-total_risk" (string). Correct JSON types.
Results grouped by risk level (Critical Risk / Important Risk) in tables with Recommendation, Category, Affected Systems, and Resolution columns. Category summary included.
